quality.rationale: 标准电磁场张量缩并恒等式证明，涉及指标升降、偏导法则与反对称性，逻辑链条完整但属常规代数练习

origin.question:
Problem 3.7. $\mathbf{F}^{\alpha  eta}$ is antisymmetric on its two indices. Show that
$$
\mathrm {F}_{\mu}^{\alpha}, \nu \mathrm {F}_{\alpha}^{\nu} = - \mathrm {F}_{\mu \alpha , \beta} \mathrm {F}^{\alpha \beta}.
$$
origin.solution:
Solution 3.7. Since $\eta^{\alpha  eta}$ is constant we have
$$
\begin{array}{l} \mathbf {F}_{\mu , \beta}^{\alpha} \mathbf {F}_{\alpha}^{\beta} = (\mathbf {F}_{\mu \gamma} \eta^{\gamma \alpha})_{, \beta} (\mathbf {F}^{\beta \sigma} \eta_{\sigma \alpha}) \\
 = \mathbf {F}_{\mu \gamma , \beta} \mathbf {F}^{\beta \sigma} (\eta^{\gamma \alpha} \eta_{\sigma \alpha}) = \mathbf {F}_{\mu \gamma , \beta} \mathbf {F}^{\beta \sigma} \delta_{\sigma}^{\alpha} = \mathbf {F}_{\mu \gamma , \beta} \mathbf {F}^{\beta \gamma} \\
 = - \mathrm {F}_{\mu a, \beta} \mathrm {F}^{\alpha \beta}, \\
 \end{array}
$$
where the last equality follows from relabelling dummy indices, and by antisymmetry.
